title: populus deltoides subsp. monilifera
intro: Populus deltoides subsp. monilifera, also known as the black cottonwood, is a subspecies of deciduous tree that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Populus deltoides subsp. monilifera include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create topical creams, ointments, and salves for wound healing and skin care.
